시편 129:1.content: Many times they have afflicted me from my youth up. Let Israel now say,

시편 129:2.content: many times they have afflicted me from my youth up, yet they have not prevailed against me.

시편 129:3.content: The plowers plowed on my back. They made their furrows long.

시편 129:4.content: Yahweh is righteous. He has cut apart the cords of the wicked.

시편 129:5.content: Let them be disappointed and turned backward, all those who hate Zion.

시편 129:6.content: Let them be as the grass on the housetops, which withers before it grows up,

시편 129:7.content: with which the reaper doesn’t fill his hand, nor he who binds sheaves, his bosom.

시편 129:8.content: Neither do those who go by say, “The blessing of Yahweh be on you. We bless you in Yahweh’s name.”
